feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Help Us Decorate Our SAP Team Space – Poster Ideas Wanted!
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We're looking to spruce up our office corridors with some high-quality SAP content! I recently came across this great SAP poster:
https://www.sap.com/germany/documents/2025/02/1288d9d0-f57e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Does anyone know where to find more similar posters – preferably large, high-resolution versions that work well for printing and display? We'd love to showcase more of what makes SAP awesome on our walls.

Thanks in advance for any tips or links!

Best,
Henric

entry.title: How long to get a learning journey code error be fixed by asking https://support.learning.sap.com
entry.content:
I have reported a code error in one of the free SAP Learning Journeys (*) via https://support.learning.sap.com > Contact Us, two months ago, but still no answer. Note that I got the information 90 minutes after posting that my report was forwarded "to the relevant team as they are more efficient and reliable when it comes to this kind of matter" (i.e. a code error).

How long should I wait, i.e. what is your experience?

Thank you.

Sandra

(*) Specifically: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/learn-the-basics-of-abap-programming-on-sap-btp

entry.title: PPF- Autopack
entry.content: I have a task which is, PPF: Pack for Inbound delivery, I have to create a custom action definition so as to implement the method for autopack. I have found a standard method for autopack, but I'm facing issue in implementing that in the action definition. Does anyone know how to implement it in the action definition?

entry.title: The partial write-off of the fixed asset with quantity, error FAA_Post081
entry.content: The original cost of the fixed asset in the evaluation area 01 is 0, and there are revaluation amounts. When partially transferring or writing off the fixed asset with quantity, the error FAA_Post081 occurs. If the transaction is carried out without specifying the quantity (using percentages or amounts), it is processed successfully. However, the requirement is for the quantity to be included in the journal entry. Could you please advise how to achieve this?

entry.title: Can somene help me how to deactivate SAP GTS to the PO,I am not able to post GR/GI
entry.content:
Hi GTS Consultants,

I tried creating PO in training server ,But when I save I got error in ME21N screen - legal control custs prod. mast. required,Ican save the PO with blocked status, but when I try to post Goods Receipt system is not allowing me to post and giving below message -

Customs document 4500000375 is technical incomplete (SAP GTS)

Message No. /SAPSLL/PLUGINR3076

Please let me know where to deactivate SAP GTS to my PO Document type or my Comp Code/Plant or at client level.

@Lakshmipathi Any inputs on this ?

entry.title: Quick way of finding successor / released objects in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Quick steps to finding out the released / successor Objects in S/4 HANA 

1. Using SAP's Cloudification Repository Viewer github link

https://sap.github.io/abap-atc-cr-cv-s4hc/?version=objectReleaseInfo_PCE2023_1.json&q=mara

refer detailed blog by- @aoyang 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/s-4-hana-cloudification-guide-for-developer-navigating-to-released-apis/ba-p/13950875

2. Alternate way to finding successor object is using backend table view ARS_W_API_SCCSSR : API Successor Data of Deprecated/Decommissioned APIs where SubObjectName is the search Object. User should have access to backend S/4 HANA system. This table stores only deprecated api's also refer other supporting table ARS_W_API_STATE for release state info.

entry.title: how to send Quality Notification to supplier Via email in S4hana public cloud by using OPD setup
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

business have requirement to send Q notification to supplier via email by using OPD setup, Email Recipients should pick from supplier master data, instead of default email address. For example, it could be read from a master data address or from a document address. Output Control should use this email address always as TO address. how i can achieve this in S4hana public cloud. your help will really appreciated. 

 

Thanks,

Kalidas

entry.title: If BAS is standard edition, can't I use joule Copliot in my build code?
Please provide details how to create Purchase info record automatically?
SAP Crystal Reports 2020 Patch 1 Version 14.3.0.3569 CR Developer software (Log4j)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently using SAP Crystal Reports 2020 Patch 1 Version 14.3.0.3569 CR Developer software

I did a vulnerability scan and I get  a Vulnerability: Remote code execution vulnerability in Apache Commons Text - CVE-2022-42889. How do i remediate this issue?

entry.title: Improve Q&A to show "SAP managed tags" and "labels" all together?
entry.content:
When I look at a question, the SAP Managed Tags are not sufficient to understand the scope of the question, they are too much general. The labels bring more value but are displayed at the end of the question. Is it possible to put them up, right below the SAP Managed Tags?

e.g. In AMDP, is it possible to use a SEQUENCE object? ... - SAP Community

this is the current way to show the question

I'd like to see "SAP managed tags" and "labels" all together:

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: How can I insert a video from https://video.sap.com into my blog?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to create a blog and insert a video from https://video.sap.com into it. 
URL: https://video.sap.com/media/t/1_0wvg5tt7

I run into an issue and an error message is displayed:

Is it possible to include a video from https://video.sap.com?

If not, which platform should be used instead? Youtube?

Thanks for your answer.

entry.title: How and where to see people bio and contact details in Community 2024?
entry.content:
I can't see people bio.

e.g. I'm pretty sure there should be something in About Andre_Fischer - SAP Community

Maybe there's one option to activate in my settings?

Or the bio and contact details (made public by the people) are hidden at another place.

EDIT April 24th: the bio details can be entered here:

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: SAP Community All Time - 47 to 50 is missing or is it reserved numbers ??
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues, 

I was wondering why 47 to 50 numbers in All time is not showing , is it reserved numbers ?? any BUG for not showing that… There could be members which are not shown up. I am referring to Ranking no 47, 48, 49 and 50 is missing and not displayed

https://community.sap.com/t5/kudos/leaderboardpage/timerange/all/tab/authors

entry.title: Error "Your post has been adjusted to remove unsupported HTML found in the message body"
entry.content:
Hello!

I am trying to include a table with merged cells in a blog post. However, when I try to save a draft of the post, I encounter an error: "Your post has been adjusted to remove unsupported HTML found in the message body," and the merge operation is deleted. Has anyone had the same issue?

Best regards

entry.title: Need to move my blog
entry.content:
I have created blogs 

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/monitoring-end-to-end-master-data-replication-using-sap-cloud-alm/ba-p/14033288?emcs_t=S2h8ZW1haWx8a3Vkb3N8TTlJQzdWMERVWEdNUEh8MTQwMzMyODh8S1VET1N8aEs

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-cloud-alm-integration-monitoring-business-attributes-in-email/ba-p/14069152?emcs_t=S2h8ZW1haWx8a3Vkb3N8TTlJQzRSWUg4NTZLWjB8MTQwNjkxNTJ8S1VET1N8aEs

under wrong tree. How do I change it?

Regards,

Santhana

entry.title: S4 HANA "Profit Center" in line item 0o1 not filled during mid-year legacy asset transfer
entry.content:
When I doing mid-year legacy asset transfer, there always have a error message Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 0o1 not filled . 

* Specify Account Assignment Types for Account Assignment Objects  already configured.

entry.title: My blog does not get posted since 3 weeks
entry.content:
I have written a blog and it is submitted for review since 3 weeks.When will it be posted?

I have made myself familiar with the respective blog posting rules, it is even reviewed by my UA,

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: (RAP Application) - Using incoming value how to hide the entities (section) dynamically
entry.content:
Hi Developers,  

    My requirement is to conditionally hide sections based on a received value, but unfortunately. The solutions I have found so far are not adequate for my specific needs, and I'm continuing to search for a better solution.   

Help me out to overcome my issue   

Given the situation:
The system should dynamically manage the visibility of the partner entity during sales order creation, such that when the sales order type is one of 'MAKO', 'RTTC', or 'RTTR', the partner entity will be hidden from Application; conversely, for any other sales order type, the partner entity field must be shown to the user.

Found solutions:   

  1. Using Virtual Element in projection view  

         Some of the drawbacks include: 
            The entity (sections) cannot be hidden based on the incoming values. 
            Virtual element implementation will call only read the entity data not for modification face.  

     2. Control Fields with UI.Hidden Annotation  

  • Define Control Fields: Create control fields in your CDS view entity that determine the visibility of entities or sections.  
  • Bind to UI.Hidden: Use the UI.Hidden annotation and bind it to the control fields. This allows you to dynamically control visibility based on the values of these fields.  
  • Set Values Dynamically: Implement determination logic in your behavior definition to set the control field values based on incoming data.  

Some of the drawbacks include: 

  1. Unnecessarily create a field in CDS views. 
  2. Real-time customers won’t accept the dummy fields.  

       To illustrate:   

  1. Within my application, there are 10 sections, and in each section, I encounter difficulty in creating a field within my CDS view entity. Even though I managed to create 10 fields currently and they function as intended, there is a concern that future issues may arise once the application is handed over to the customer.  
  2. Because the customer wants to add another entity (Section) via the RAP Extension and simultaneously conceal a section contingent on a specific field's value, I cannot compel them to introduce an unnecessary placeholder field within their CDS view.   

 

Regards, 

Udhaya

entry.title: SAP Community AI Conversation Chatbot to ask Q&A?
entry.content:
Do you have some place where we can ask Qs to get quick answers based tons of community questions been answered and accepted as solution... This will benefit for us instead of waiting for answer from community colleagues... SAP Community is having huge knowledge database which can be utilised in a better way so this will increase more non SAP colleagues to join SAP community to get more members .. Do you have vector db for us to use

Any APIs do you plan to release which we can build our own chatbot in Gradio or streamlit
